# Node Interface - Physical

## Filter by id

Example: single id

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_intf_phy.id:iserver.output.default
```

Example: id pattern

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_intf_phy.ids:iserver.output.default
```

Developer

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_intf_phy.id:devel.debug
```
